languages.text: "Это какая-то проверка? Нашей вотчиной всегда был Даргонус".
"Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."
languages.original_text: "Это какая-то проверка? Нашей вотчиной всегда был Даргонус".

traits.locale_text: "Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."
"Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."
"Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."

languages.text: «¿Es una especie de prueba? Nuestro dominio siempre ha sido Dargonus».
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: «¿Es una especie de prueba? Nuestro dominio siempre ha sido Dargonus».

languages.text: “你这是在试探我吗？我们的领地一直在达戈努斯。”
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: “你这是在试探我吗？我们的领地一直在达戈努斯。”

languages.text: « Vous cherchez à me tester ? Notre domaine a toujours été Dargonus. »
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: « Vous cherchez à me tester ? Notre domaine a toujours été Dargonus. »

languages.text: "Sınav mı bu? Yurdumuz her daim Dargonus olmuştur."
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: "Sınav mı bu? Yurdumuz her daim Dargonus olmuştur."

languages.text: "Soll das ein Test sein? Unser Reich war schon immer Dargonus."
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: "Soll das ein Test sein? Unser Reich war schon immer Dargonus."

languages.text: 「これは何かのテストですか？我々の領地はいつもドラゴナスでした。」
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of test? Our domain has always been Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: 「これは何かのテストですか？我々の領地はいつもドラゴナスでした。」
